summary: A brief product review update where Shapiro reports that Porter Cable sandpaper he previously considered didn't live up to expectations. He finds it no better than Norton and inferior to Mirka brand sandpaper, which he recommends instead. The post is a casual follow-up to an earlier sandpaper sourcing discussion.
key_points: Porter Cable sandpaper performs no better than Norton brand
Mirka sandpaper remains the superior option among those tested
Mirka is available on Amazon for easy purchasing
money_quotes: I tried the aforementioned PC sandpaper yesterday, and it's no better than the Norton, and nowhere near as good as the Mirka.
key_insight: Among sandpaper brands tested, Mirka significantly outperforms both Porter Cable and Norton.
